people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: The brain has about 10^14 synapses and we only live for about 10^9 seconds.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Our intelligence is what makes us human, and AI is an extension of that quality.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: We have to be humble about what we know and don't know about how the brain works.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: AI could be the most transformative technology in human history.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: AI will probably most likely lead to the end of the world, but in the meantime, there'll be great companies.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: The cloud is the new normal for enterprise IT.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: We are in a mobile-first, cloud-first world.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Every company in every industry is becoming a technology company.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Everything fails, all the time. Design for failure.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Hybrid cloud is where every enterprise will operate.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Good design is not just what looks good. It also needs to perform, convert, astonish.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: The home should adapt to you, not the other way around.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: The smart home is about making everyday life simpler and more efficient.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Interoperability is the key to a truly connected home.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Your home automation should work locally, privately, and without the cloud.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: We don't override the models. If you start doing that, you get in trouble.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: The market is beatable, but only with math and discipline.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Markets look a lot less efficient from the banks of the Hudson than the banks of the Charles.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Risk is the uncertainty of future outcomes.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Mathematics is the language the market speaks if you listen carefully enough.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.role: Creator of C & Co-creator of Unix
people.quote: UNIX is basically a simple operating system, but you have to be a genius to understand the simplicity.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Premature optimization is the root of all evil.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: Code is read much more often than it is written.

people.name: Giuseppe
people.quote: There are only two kinds of languages: the ones people complain about and the ones nobody uses.
